---
title: CZ CELLxGENE
alias: &ALIAS cellxgene
href: https://cellxgene.cziscience.com/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

CZ CELLxGENE (Chan Zuckerberg Initiative) is a platform for exploring, analyzing, and downloading large collections of single-cell transcriptomic data curated with consistent cell metadata.

## Key Features

- Hosts over 50 million cells curated with standardized ontology-based metadata (CL, UBERON, MONDO)
- Interactive browser for UMAP visualization, gene expression queries, and differential expression
- Census API enables programmatic access to the entire corpus for large-scale analyses
- Strict data schema enforces consistent cell type, tissue, disease, and assay annotations
- Integrated with CZI's CELLxGENE Annotate tool for collaborative dataset annotation

## Use Cases in Research

- Querying immune cell gene expression profiles across disease states relevant to infection
- Downloading harmonized single-cell datasets for training or benchmarking AI/ML models
- Performing cross-dataset meta-analyses of host transcriptional responses to pathogens
- Identifying marker genes for cell type annotation in novel microbiome-host studies
- Generating reference embeddings of human cell states for virtual cell modeling

## Getting Started

Visit [CZ CELLxGENE](https://cellxgene.cziscience.com/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
